name: Jorvik
title: The Vikings in Britain
note: Pictures for the big-picture opening: a Viking longship and a real early-medieval helmet (no horns!).

items.caption: A reconstructed Viking longship. The Vikings were not just raiders but traders, explorers and settlers who reached Greenland and North America, and made York their capital.
items.kidcaption: A real Viking longship! In boats like this, the Vikings sailed all the way to America, 500 years before Columbus. And they ruled York.

items.caption: An early medieval helmet found at York. And no, real Vikings did not wear horns on their helmets, that is a myth from an opera 1000 years later.
items.kidcaption: A real helmet dug up in York. Big secret: Vikings did NOT have horns on their helmets! Someone made that up for a play, hundreds of years later.
